description_long: This is a large, single-family house set on a landscaped plot with a prominent driveway and multiple walkways. The house features a sprawling, horizontally oriented structure with a complex, multi-gabled roof and several visible entry points. The exterior appears to be clad in a combination of wood and stone, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The front yard includes a circular driveway, manicured lawns, and garden beds, while the rear and sides are bordered by additional green spaces and paved paths. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several grouped under the gables. The main entryway is accentuated by a set of steps, a covered porch, and decorative columns, creating an inviting and grand approach.
description: A large, rustic-style house with a multi-gabled roof, wood and stone exterior, and landscaped grounds featuring a circular driveway and prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, circular driveway, and the full facade with multiple gables and grouped windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the extended roofline, and the side garden areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional entry points, and the continuation of the landscaped grounds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, side pathways, and the integration of the building with the surrounding lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, decorative columns, and a prominent front door.
